title: psychotria aquatica subsp. aquatica
intro: Psychotria aquatica subsp. aquatica, also known as the water psychotria, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The water psychotria is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in wound healing, reducing fever, and providing relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
